title: Looking for a producer for my upcoming EP!
body: Working on a 5-track EP exploring identity and city life in Delhi. Need a producer who understands conscious hip-hop with Indian classical elements. DM me if interested — let's make something real. 🎤

title: Underground Cypher — Pune, April 18!
body: The cypher is back! Monthly freestyle battle at Warehouse 3, Koregaon Park. Cash prize for the top MC. Open freestyle starts 9 PM, judged rounds at 10 PM. Tag your crew! 🔥🎵

title: New recording: fusion ghazal experiment
body: Just finished recording a ghazal layered over lo-fi beats. It's experimental but I'm excited about the direction. Would love feedback from fellow artists before I release it. Drop a comment if you want a preview! 🎶

title: Co-writing session this weekend?
body: Any singer-songwriters in Bengaluru free this Saturday? I'm thinking of hosting a co-writing session at my home studio. Bring your guitar, a notebook, and some chai. Let's write something beautiful together. ☕🎸
